name: revit_create_truss
description: Creates or edits a structural truss from two columns or an existing truss with profile and member type settings.

column_ids.description: Two structural column element ids for new truss placement

truss_id.description: Existing truss element id when editing instead of creating

view_id.description: ViewPlan id whose level elevation positions the truss

beam_type_ids.description: Optional map of truss member indices to FamilySymbol ids for chord and web members

notes: Replace TrussForm and LineTool sketching with profile curve data or pre-defined TrussGeometry; require either column_ids or truss_id.
